message:
fix: resolve provider/model strings in WithModel

WithModel("openai/gpt-5.4-mini") now correctly parses the provider
prefix and constructs the appropriate profile type with the bare model
name. Previously, the full string was stored verbatim and sent to the
API, causing failures (e.g., explorer agent's "openai/gpt-5.4-mini"
was sent as the model name to OpenAI, which rejected it).

This matches the format used by harbor and the CLI (--model openai/gpt-5.4),
so agent frontmatter can use the same canonical provider/model strings.

Cross-provider resolution also works: an OpenAI profile calling
WithModel("anthropic/claude-opus-4-6") returns an Anthropic profile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
